_comment: Phase 3 Batch A: high-visibility UI strings. Big5 byte length must <= original byte length. Patcher cp950-encodes + pads with NULL bytes (no walker constraint like Phase 1 dialogs — these are plain C strings consumed via strlen).
_policy: Preserve _ delimiters (menu group separator), %s %d ^0 ^1 format placeholders, leading/trailing spaces, and punctuation
_batch_a: Main menu / difficulty / quit / replay / diplomat menu (most visible after intro)
